name: aurawear-x
description: Enterprise Fashion Commerce Platform with Virtual Try-On

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.backend: cd backend && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run dev

author: AuraWear X
